meta.educational_goal: To educate users on the importance and mechanisms of congestion control in networking.
expected_interactions: Show simulation of TCP Slow Start behavior

states.label: Idle
evidence: <button onclick="alert('Simulating TCP Slow Start: Starting with a window size of 1 packet. The window doubles with each round trip until a loss is detected...')">Show Simulation</button>
